faqs.question: How does the Legal AI Assistant work?
faqs.answer: Our AI assistant is trained to analyze initial legal problems from the information you provide to assess the situation and recommend the type of lawyer with expertise that matches your problem. However, AI advice is only an initial assessment and cannot replace advice from a professional lawyer.

faqs.question: Are lawyers on the Lawslane platform verified?
faqs.answer: Yes, every lawyer who joins us must go through a rigorous qualification verification process, including lawyer license, work history, and specialized expertise, so you can be confident that you will receive service from a real expert.

faqs.question: What is the process for hiring a lawyer through Lawslane?
faqs.answer: You can start by using AI to analyze the problem, searching for a lawyer from the list, or making an appointment to talk directly. Once you have chosen the lawyer you want, you can open a case and pay through our Escrow system to start working immediately.

faqs.question: Will my information be kept confidential?
faqs.answer: Of course, we prioritize customer privacy and confidentiality at the highest level. All your information and conversations with lawyers on our platform will be encrypted and kept confidential according to the highest standards. You can read more details in our Privacy Policy.

faqs.question: What should I do if there is a problem with a lawyer?
faqs.answer: If you encounter a problem or are dissatisfied with the service, you can use the 'Report Problem' button on the chat page of that case to contact our customer support team immediately. We will quickly investigate and provide assistance as soon as possible.

faqs.question: What is 'Cap & Deal' and how do I use it?
faqs.answer: 'Cap & Deal' is an AI technology that transforms chat screenshots (Line, Messenger, etc.) containing deal agreements into automatic, legally sound PDF contracts. This ensures you have solid evidence for any future legal proceedings if a contract is breached.

AboutPage.title: About Lawslane
AboutPage.subtitle: Online legal consultation platform connecting you with professional lawyers nationwide
AboutPage.subtitleEn: Online legal consultation platform connecting you with professional lawyers nationwide
AboutPage.quote: "Business problems take time to solve, but attitude can be fixed right now"
AboutPage.quoteDesc: This quote reflects who we are at Team Lawslane

story.intro: When it comes to "law" and "business", what everyone sees is seriousness, it's an adult matter, it's experience that must be accumulated over decades... which we accept requires "time"
story.question: "But if you ask, why are young people coming together to build a Startup in the most challenging industry like Legal Tech?"
story.answer: The answer lies in the latter sentence... "Attitude can be fixed right now"
story.whoWeAre: We are a group of young people who grew up with technology. We see the same Pain Points that SME entrepreneurs or small business owners face:

painPoints.fear: Fear of the law to the point of not daring to move
painPoints.expensive: Afraid to hire a lawyer because they think it's expensive
painPoints.disadvantage: Disadvantaged in contracts due to lack of knowledge

story.solution: We couldn't stand watching this problem "waiting for time to fix". So we chose to use "attitude" to lead the way.
story.belief1: An attitude that believes "technology can make justice more accessible"
story.belief2: An attitude that believes "law shouldn't be bitter medicine, but should be a shield protecting businesses"
story.whatWeDo: Lawslane was born from the gathering of us—a small but passionate Startup team. We write code, we train AI, we talk to lawyers, we study Pain Points of entrepreneurs, to create a platform that connects the world of "professional lawyers" with "business owners" most easily.
story.experience: We may not have 20 years of courtroom experience (that's the job of our lawyer partners), but we have the heart to see Thailand's Legal Ecosystem change for the better... right now.
story.mission: This is the first step of our journey to build Lawslane as a trusted legal assistant for everyone.

tip.title: Legal Tip: AGM Meetings
tip.desc: Limited companies must hold an Annual General Meeting (AGM) within 4 months of the end of the accounting period and submit the list of shareholders (Bor.Jor.5) within 14 days after the meeting. Delays can result in fines for both the entity and directors.
